tasks.input_idea: A SaaS tool that helps neighborhood cafes sell unsold pastries before closing time.
tasks.problem_statement: Independent cafes lose daily revenue from unsold fresh inventory.
tasks.target_audience: independent cafes in dense urban neighborhoods
tasks.pricing_model: 4% transaction fee with optional monthly analytics
tasks.expected_improvement: Improve scalability and clarity slightly while keeping implementation realistic.

tasks.input_idea: An AI productivity platform for everyone that has many tools and automations.
tasks.problem_statement: People waste time on repetitive work but the idea is still too vague.
tasks.target_audience: everyone with work or study tasks
tasks.expected_improvement: Narrow audience, remove non-core features, and establish a viable pricing strategy.

tasks.input_idea: A brain-chip AGI app that instantly solves every business problem for every company worldwide.
tasks.problem_statement: All companies need guaranteed growth overnight through futuristic intelligence.
tasks.expected_improvement: Transform an unrealistic concept into a focused, feasible startup with credible pricing and scope.
